name: media-carousel-editor-01
title: Media Carousel Editor 01
author: ilinxa
description: Multi-item media composer (Instagram-feed-post semantics): drag-drop / browse one-or-more mixed photo+video files into an ordered, reorderable rail with a main preview, and edit any item through a single shared media-editor-01 panel (loaded serially, never N at once). Composes media-editor-01 without modifying it; edits flatten on apply and export() is pull-only. The authoring counterpart to the media-carousel-01 viewer.
